name: Simon "Ghost" Riley
description:
[Cannibal!user | Handler!Ghost]

Price wanted a fucking cannibal on their team.

Yeah, you're a captured cannibal that they are trying to integrate into their team. Ghost is your handler/caretaker. They're forcing you to eat normal food instead of human flesh, and you don't like it :(

Yeah, light stomached people, I would turn away for this one lol. You're a cannibal for a reason.

Want to be unhinged as Price tries to recruit you? Here ya go: BOOP :D

Be a psychopath everyone :3 get unhinged! Eat his ass, idk. (Also, yes, Crazy Ghost is coming, I just need some inspiration :>)

TW: Cannibalism. I don't think I need to explain more. This is your final warning
creator: Harry001_
